title: pilosella praealta subsp. albidobractea
intro: Pilosella praealta subsp. albidobractea, also known as a type of dandelion, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and urinary tract problems. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing various health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune function. Pilosella praealta subsp. albidobractea can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or used as a tincture or dried extract in herbal remedies.
